perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with three women standing in front of a plain background; the woman in the middle wears a black beanie and a 'HAHABABY' t-shirt while the woman on the right has a purple sweater draped over her shoulders. (2) The woman on the right points to the forehead of the woman in the beanie, followed by close-up shots showing white flakes on the scalp. (3) The woman with the purple sweater holds up various AROMASE product bottles (green and black packaging) and demonstrates applying a liquid directly to her scalp. (4) The video concludes with the three women laughing and interacting while holding the scalp care products.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays throughout the entire video. (2) Multiple female voices are heard talking simultaneously in an energetic and conversational tone. (3) Occasional high-pitched sound effects (SFX) like 'ding' and 'pop' noises occur in sync with text appearing on screen. (4) The music remains at a consistent volume, supporting the continuous dialogue until the very end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '為什麼要戴帽子' (Why are you wearing a hat?) - Hook/Questioning tone. (2) '因為最近可能換季吧...你看都有頭皮屑' (Maybe because the season is changing... look at the dandruff) - Explanatory tone. (3) '艾瑪絲頭皮養護組' (AROMASE Scalp Care Set) - Branding. (4) '第一步... 第二步... 第三步...' (Step 1... Step 2... Step 3...) - Instructional/Functional text. (5) '100% 不含藥' (100% medicine-free) - Reassuring tone. (6) '不"屑"不"屑"' (No flakes, no worries) - Playful/Pun tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem discovery -> Expert explanation -> Product demonstration -> Result summary

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with her hair in braids, wearing a black t-shirt with a purple sweater draped over her shoulders, acting as the product expert.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a beige wall and a hint of furniture, likely a studio or office environment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional tutorial for AROMASE scalp care products. It uses a relatable problem (dandruff and itchy scalp during seasonal changes) to introduce a multi-step solution. The content is presented in a vlog-like, conversational style to build trust and demonstrate ease of use.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, demonstration of product use, and focus on brand benefits.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: HAHABABY apparel and variety-show style editing and captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young adults experiencing common scalp issues, leveraging the influence of known creators associated with the HAHABABY brand.
